sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96529" key="stenwpei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στενωπ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στενωπός, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.9</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
